werbepartner_content: Expand your reach. Advertise on my website!
Do you want to showcase your products or services to a wide audience? My website offers you the perfect platform to promote your brand and win new customers.
• National visibility: Reach visitors from across the country and effectively boost your exposure.
• Maximum attention: Your ad is displayed to all visitors regardless of their location.
• Fair presentation: The order of ads is randomized on every page load so all advertising partners get an equal chance to be seen.
• Privacy guaranteed: I only determine the country of origin of the visitors. No other data is collected.
Your ad space will only be shown to visitors from the respective country. If you wish to advertise internationally you can book additional ad spaces for other countries.
Secure your ad space now and target your audience specifically tailored to the region that matters to you!
• For the first 90 days you pay only 140 Francs per 30 days of presence.
• From day 91 the price drops to 120 Francs per 30 days of presence for days 91 to 180.
• From day 181 the ad space costs only 100 Francs per 30 days of presence.
• A link to your offer on the product page or service page
• A link to an image to be used in the ad space with an image size of 500 by 300 pixels
I focus on quality and trustworthiness. Every advertising partner is personally vetted by me to ensure they are reputable companies that meet my high standards.
Contact me today and place your brand on my website. Together we will build a strong presence and drive your business forward sustainably.
Send me a message if you need more information or want to book an ad space directly. I look forward to supporting you on your path to success!
